interest.title: Interests
interest.subtitle: Add interests to your profile so we can show events that fit you best.

modal.title: New Request
modal.line1: Thanks for adding a new interest. We'll review this event type and add it to the public list within 24h.
modal.line2: We'll also add it to your personal interests for personalization.

interest.noResultsDescription: We couldn't find any interests with that name. How about requesting WE Party to add it?

hero.subtitle: Find incredible events, connect with friends, and never miss an unforgettable experience. Your next adventure starts here.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: The most complete platform for event lovers

discover.title: Smart Discovery
discover.desc: AI-powered recommendations based on your preferences and history.

friends.title: Bring Friends
friends.desc: See which events your friends are attending and plan together.

nearby.title: Nearby Events
nearby.desc: Find events happening close to you with real-time geolocation.

notify.title: Smart Notifications
notify.desc: Get notified about events you'll love and never miss a thing.

save.title: Save Favorites
save.desc: Bookmark events you're interested in and access them easily later.

create.title: Create Events
create.desc: Host your own events and reach thousands of people nearby.

events.ctaText: These are just a few of the thousands of events waiting for you.

step2.title: Discover Events

step3.title: Have Fun!
